compiled_for.goal: Fix the flaky CI failure in the widgets service. From the project context,

decisions.content: Host the beta on the shared acme-platform cluster.

Host the beta on a dedicated small cluster after the March
latency incident.

failed_approaches.content: Caching whole responses in Redis; stale order totals in checkout.

invariants.content: Deploy to staging only with `make deploy ENV=staging TAG=beta`.
Keep p95 read latency under 250 ms at 400 rps.

mission.objective: Harden the acme-widgets service for the beta cut.
success_conditions: Staging runs 24h without a p95 regression.

next_action: Reproduce the CI failure locally with `pytest -q tests/store`.

stop_conditions.content: Stop the rollout if error rate exceeds 0.5% for 10 consecutive minutes.
